turns.question: Alright, I gotta run, catch you later!
turns.questionKo: 자, 나 가봐야 해, 나중에 봐!

turns.question: I should get going too, it was good seeing you.
turns.answer: You too, let's not wait so long next time.
turns.answerKo: 나도 반가웠어, 다음엔 이렇게 오래 안 기다리자.

turns.question: Agreed. We should actually do this again sometime soon.
turns.questionKo: 맞아. 진짜 조만간 또 이렇게 만나야겠다.
turns.answer: Absolutely, let's plan something for next week.
turns.answerKo: 당연하지, 다음 주에 뭐 계획 잡아보자.

turns.question: Okay, I'll text you some days that work for me.
turns.questionKo: 알았어, 내가 가능한 날짜들 문자로 보낼게.
turns.answer: Perfect, I'll keep an eye out for it.

turns.question: Alright, take care of yourself until then!
turns.answer: You too, drive safe getting home!
turns.answerKo: 너도, 집 갈 때 운전 조심해!

turns.question: Okay, I'm gonna head out, this was really fun.
turns.questionKo: 그래, 나 이제 갈게, 오늘 정말 재밌었어.
turns.answer: Yeah, it really was, see you soon!

turns.question: For sure. I gotta run, but let's catch up properly next time.
turns.questionKo: 그럼. 나 가야 하는데, 다음엔 제대로 얘기 나누자.
turns.answer: For sure, I'll text you sometime this week.

turns.question: Sounds good. I should probably head home now, it's getting late.
turns.questionKo: 좋아. 나 이제 집에 가야 할 것 같아, 늦어지네.
turns.answer: Yeah, same here, let's call it a night.
turns.answerKo: 응, 나도 그래, 오늘은 여기서 마무리하자.

turns.question: Alright, I'll let you get back to it then, see ya!
turns.questionKo: 그래, 그럼 하던 거 마저 하게 놔둘게, 안녕!
turns.answer: Thanks, see you later, take care!

turns.question: You too, get home safe!
turns.answer: Will do, text me when you're back!

turns.question: Alright, I've got somewhere to be, gotta run.
turns.questionKo: 자, 나 가야 할 곳이 있어서, 이만 가볼게.
turns.answer: No worries, go ahead, see you soon.

turns.question: Okay, I'm gonna dip, catch you later.
turns.questionKo: 그래, 나 이제 갈게, 나중에 봐.
turns.answer: Alright, later! Have a good night.
turns.answerKo: 알았어, 나중에 봐! 좋은 밤 보내.

turns.question: You too! Actually, wait -- are we still on for the weekend?
turns.questionKo: 너도! 아 참, 잠깐, 우리 주말 약속 여전히 유효한 거지?
turns.answer: Yeah, definitely, wouldn't miss it for anything.
turns.answerKo: 응, 당연하지, 무슨 일이 있어도 안 빠질 거야.

turns.question: Perfect, I'll message you the details tomorrow then.
turns.questionKo: 좋아, 그럼 내일 자세한 내용 문자로 보낼게.
turns.answer: Sounds good, looking forward to it already.

turns.question: Alright, for real this time, I'll catch you later, bye!
turns.questionKo: 자, 이번엔 진짜로, 나중에 보자, 안녕!
